Classes and methods for JUnit XML test suites, Waf build tasks, file compression, OpenOCD configurations, and Pebble firmware tools.

## Folders
- **[junit_xml](junit_xml/README.md)**: Classes and methods for creating and managing JUnit XML test suites and test cases.

## Files
- **[__init__.py](__init__.py.md)**: License information for the Apache License, Version 2.0.
- **[asm.py](asm.py.md)**: Defines a Waf build task for assembling source files with extensions '.s' and '.S'.
- **[binary_header.py](binary_header.py.md)**: Creates a header file with an array from a binary file, supporting hexadecimal and compression options.
- **[c_inject_include_files.py](c_inject_include_files.py.md)**: Adds `-include` flags to CFLAGS and ASFLAGS for specified files using `inject_include_files` attribute.
- **[c_preprocessor.py](c_preprocessor.py.md)**: Tool to invoke the C preprocessor on any file type using a task execution command.
- **[cc2564_service_pack_convert.py](cc2564_service_pack_convert.py.md)**: Converts a Bluetooth service pack file by extracting and processing HCI command data.
- **[clang_compilation_database.py](clang_compilation_database.py.md)**: Generates a JSON compilation database for C and C++ tasks in Waf build systems.
- **[compress.py](compress.py.md)**: Compresses files using the xz utility with specific options for LZMA2 compression.
- **[emscripten-cache-primer-main.c](emscripten-cache-primer-main.c.md)**: A simple C program that prints "Hello World." to the console.
- **[emscripten.py](emscripten.py.md)**: A Waftool that extends the 'cprogram' feature with Emscripten-specific variables and settings.
- **[file_name_c_define.py](file_name_c_define.py.md)**: Defines a `__FILE_NAME__` macro for C/C++ source files, removing other path components.
- **[generate_log_strings_json.py](generate_log_strings_json.py.md)**: Generates a JSON file of log strings from an ELF file, ensuring compliance with logging rules.
- **[generate_timezone_data.py](generate_timezone_data.py.md)**: Generates a timezone database resource object from the Olson database using timezone tools.
- **[gettext.py](gettext.py.md)**: Tools for configuring and generating gettext tasks in the Waf build system.
- **[gitinfo.py](gitinfo.py.md)**: Extracts and validates Git revision information including tag, commit, and timestamp.
- **[insert_text_section_crc.py](insert_text_section_crc.py.md)**: Calculates and inserts CRC32 checksum for the .text section in ELF files.
- **[lcov_info_parser.py](lcov_info_parser.py.md)**: Parses `lcov.info` files to generate Arcanist code coverage data.
- **[ldscript.py](ldscript.py.md)**: Processes linker scripts for C programs and shared libraries in a Waf build environment.
- **[objcopy.py](objcopy.py.md)**: Functions for executing objcopy commands to convert ELF files to HEX or BIN formats.
- **[openocd.py](openocd.py.md)**: Tools for configuring and managing OpenOCD for different JTAG and SWD interfaces in firmware development.
- **[openocd_bb2_ft2232.cfg](openocd_bb2_ft2232.cfg.md)**: Configuration for the deprecated ft2232 OpenOCD driver with specific VID, PID, and layout settings.
- **[openocd_bb2_ftdi.cfg](openocd_bb2_ftdi.cfg.md)**: Configuration for FTDI interface with specific device description, VID/PID, and signal layout.
- **[openocd_jtag_ftdi.cfg](openocd_jtag_ftdi.cfg.md)**: Configuration for FTDI JTAG interface with specific device description, VID/PID, and signal layout.
- **[openocd_swd_cmsisdap.cfg](openocd_swd_cmsisdap.cfg.md)**: Configuration for OpenOCD using CMSIS-DAP interface with SWD transport.
- **[openocd_swd_ftdi.cfg](openocd_swd_ftdi.cfg.md)**: Configuration for OpenOCD using FTDI interface with SWD transport and LED signal setup.
- **[openocd_swd_jlink.cfg](openocd_swd_jlink.cfg.md)**: Configuration for OpenOCD to use J-Link interface with SWD transport.
- **[openocd_swd_tigard.cfg](openocd_swd_tigard.cfg.md)**: Configuration for OpenOCD to use the Tigard V1.1 adapter with SWD transport.
- **[pebble_arm_gcc.py](pebble_arm_gcc.py.md)**: Configuration script for setting up the ARM GCC toolchain and Clang compiler options for Pebble firmware.
- **[pebble_sdk_gcc.py](pebble_sdk_gcc.py.md)**: Configures environment variables for compiling third-party apps and injects metadata into binary files.
- **[pebble_sdk_version.py](pebble_sdk_version.py.md)**: Sets environment variables for SDK version major and minor from a process info file.
- **[pebble_test.py](pebble_test.py.md)**: Implements a testing framework for Pebble firmware using Waf, including test execution and reporting.
- **[protoc.py](protoc.py.md)**: Tool for integrating protocol buffers into a build system using nanopb with Waf.
- **[ragel.py](ragel.py.md)**: Executes a command to generate C code from Ragel state machine definitions.
- **[show_configure.py](show_configure.py.md)**: A Waf build context class to display the last used configure command with environment variables.
- **[sparse_length_encoding.py](sparse_length_encoding.py.md)**: Implements a variant of run-length encoding for binary data with long zero runs, including encoding and decoding functions and unit tests.
- **[stm32_crc.py](stm32_crc.py.md)**: A symbolic link to `../tools/stm32_crc.py`.
- **[xcode_pebble.py](xcode_pebble.py.md)**: Generates an Xcode project file for Waf, including configurations, targets, and file references.
